description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsSea green wallet that has a zipped closure, inner zipped pocket in the middle with an id card holder, two insert pockets and six card holders on either sides, zipped pocket at the back, insert pocket on the front with a metallic keyhole detail with branding and stitch detailingMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions:11 cm x 20.5 cm
